title: Timing side-channel on client_secret comparison
description: Using \!= for client_secret comparison leaks length/prefix info via timing. Must use subtle::ConstantTimeEq. Check all secret comparisons in Broadside's OAuth implementation.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: webhook.rs uses subtle::ConstantTimeEq with SHA-256 pre-hash. No OAuth endpoints exist. The only secret comparison is already constant-time.
